steps.title: Find the shared complaint
steps.content: Text 1 says scholarship overemphasizes fragmented narrative and neglects works with coherent structures. Text 2 says scholars have focused too much on fragmentation versus coherence and have missed other stylistic patterns.

steps.title: State the common view
steps.content: A says scholarship should move beyond style, but Text 2 wants other stylistic inquiry. C makes computer technology the issue, which Text 1 does not. D focuses on reputation repair, which Text 2 does not require. Both authors see current scholarship as unnecessarily limited. The answer is B.
